mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND status = 'visible'

SELECT c.id, c.article_id AS articleId, c.user_id AS userId, u.nickname, u.username, c.content, c.status, c.created_at AS createdAt FROM comments c JOIN users u ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE c.article_id = #{articleId} AND c.status = 'visible' ORDER BY c.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (article_id, user_id, content, status) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.article_id AS articleId, c.user_id AS userId, a.title AS articleTitle, COALESCE(u.nickname, u.username) AS userNickname, u.nickname, u.username, c.content, c.status, c.admin_note AS adminNote, c.created_at AS createdAt FROM comments c JOIN users u ON u.id = c.user_id JOIN articles a ON a.id = c.article_id WHERE c.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET status = #{status}, admin_note = #{adminNote}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
